placeholder.name: Optional node name
placeholder.specificStates:
One state ID per line, e.g.:
system.adapter.admin.0.alive
system.adapter.history.0.alive
placeholder.objectName: Custom object name for state creation

outputMode.individual: Individual - Separate message per state change
outputMode.grouped: Grouped - Combined message with all current values

info.pattern: Use * as wildcard to match multiple states. Examples:
patternExamples: hm-rpc.1.* - All states from HM-RPC adapter instance 1
info.specificStates: Enter exact state IDs, one per line. No wildcards allowed.
info.objectName: If specified, missing states will be created with this object name
info.initialValue: Send current state value immediately after subscription

outputMode.individual: Each state change sends a separate message with msg.topic = state ID
outputMode.grouped: All state changes trigger a message with current values of all subscribed states

groupedOutputList: msg.changedState = ID of the state that triggered the message
msg.changedValue = new value of the changed state

help.title: State Change Monitoring
help.description: Monitor ioBroker state changes with support for wildcards and multiple states.
